acet.title: Transformation in a Generation: 2021 Annual Report
acet.excerpt: Innovation’s Contribution With its contribution to productivity growth, innovation can drive the process of economic  transformation, thus allowing low- and middle-income countries to deliver a broad-based,  sustainable and resilient growth.
